vBRIEFInfo.description: Story 5 of #845 triage v1: extend the deft-directive-refinement skill with a new Phase 0 (cache + triage). Owner: Agent A5 (independent track; single-file owner).

plan.title: feat(skills): extend deft-directive-refinement with Phase 0 (cache + triage)

narratives.Problem: The current refinement skill ingests every candidate to `proposed/` first, then evaluates. This is the root cause of `proposed/` semantic drift and the wasted-regen problem (#845).
narratives.Overview: Add a new Phase 0 to `skills/deft-directive-refinement/SKILL.md` that operates on the new cache + triage primitives (Stories 1-4). Phase 0 invokes `task triage:cache` to populate, then routes each new candidate through `task triage:accept|reject|defer|needs-ac`. The existing Phase 1 then runs ONLY on accepted items. Phase 0 auto-skips when the cache is empty (graceful degradation; consumers don't need to opt in).
narratives.Constraint: Single-file owner: this story modifies `skills/deft-directive-refinement/SKILL.md` only. Zero overlap with any other agent's scope. The numbered-menu prompts in Phase 0 MUST follow the deterministic-questions contract (Discuss + Back as final two options) per `contracts/deterministic-questions.md`.
narratives.Outcome: Phase 0 documented in the skill with: trigger conditions, three-tier inventory model explanation, action menu, deterministic-question gates, and explicit chaining into existing Phase 1 (which is renumbered if necessary). The skill's `## When to Use` section updated to reflect the Phase 0 entry.
narratives.Test: Schema validation via existing skill-doc lint (if any) plus manual readability pass. No new pytest file required; the change is doc-only.
narratives.Action: Edit skills/deft-directive-refinement/SKILL.md to insert Phase 0 before existing Phase 1. Update headings, cross-references, and `## When to Use`. Add deterministic-questions contract reference.

items.title: skills/deft-directive-refinement/SKILL.md gains Phase 0 (cache + triage) before existing Phase 1
Phase 0 numbered prompts conform to contracts/deterministic-questions.md (Discuss + Back final two)
Phase 0 auto-skips with informational message when cache is empty
Cross-references updated (When to Use, chaining, related skills)
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry: feat(skills): refinement Phase 0 (#845 Story 5)

references.title: Epic vBRIEF for #845 (related-plan; planRef captures parent semantic)
